title: taraxacum indivisum
intro: Taraxacum indivisum, also known as the lesser dandelion or false dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum indivisum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting liver function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Taraxacum indivisum can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
